faqData.question: What time does the ceremony start?
faqData.answer: The wedding ceremony starts at 10:00 AM.

faqData.question: What is the dress code?
faqData.answer: you can wear casual or formal attire with the touch of our wedding motif

faqData.question: Is RSVP required?
faqData.answer: Yes, kindly RSVP on or before May 18, 2026.

faqData.question: Can I bring a plus one?
faqData.answer: Please follow the name(s) written on your invitation.
